reviews.comment:
Es un paso obligatorio por su ubicación, la gente que atiende es muy amable. Lo que me parece mal es que comprando en la cafetería no carguen los puntos serviclub si pagas con tarjeta de crédito.

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-visit because of its location, and the staff is very friendly. What I find unacceptable is that they don't credit Serviclub points when you pay with a credit card at the café.
